item.description: FP Edit: first time FP. Thank you guys. This a clear sign that this awesome community cares about important topics!
item.dc:creator: fiorideiliberi11

item.title: My first cakeday! Have a bunch of random stuff (and cat tax)
item.description:
Well, he *did* say it in Korean, so not technically a lie.
At 18 years old, my hip joint dislocated because I turned around to look at a cute boy.
Once more, with feeling (Buffy the Vampire Slayer)
Moomin mom has her priorities straight.
I'm neutral good, my partner is chaotic neutral.
A weekly occurrence in our home.
BtVS and Lucifer are my favourite shows. They're the background noise on my TV when I do other things because I don't need to look at the screen to see what happens. If anyone have recommendations for other shows in the same style as those two, share in the comments, I need new shows to watch bc my partner is getting fed up listening to the same thing over and over. Please help me get a new hyperfixation.
To late for Ceasar day...
Me too, Moomin dad. Me too....
Ending with two classics.
Cattax Charlie was only 9 months old, she didn't even have her learner's permit.
I meme'd my cat. She doesn't like cream, milk, ice cream, chicken or beef. She does like gingerbread cookies, sugarfree oatmeal cookies, and yoghurt with homemade müsli. And tuna, of course.
"And AAAAAA-AA-AAII will always live Yoouuuu" Thanks to every Imgurian who make this place awesome. Edit: Wow, I'm glad so many found joy in my first cakeday post. Thank you for the accolade, and I'm very grateful for all viewing suggestions. Love you all! <3
item.dc:creator: Kittensandyarns

Fun stuff. Send something tremendous. Same name on discord.
item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Rear-ending you with bottom shelf memes.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Did not intend to confuse people so badly here. For context: Hello! My name is Heather. I'm a server a restaurant. I had 2 people sit at a table of mine. The lady introduced me to her husband and, in return said "Heather, this is my husband" To which I said "You don't look like my husband" (because I also have a husband...who looked nothing like the man she said was 'my husband') ...just a shitty dad joke. Wasn't expecting to rile anyone up over it
Let's take a dive into the algorithm. What does the internet suggest this bottom shelf meme distributor should purchase today?
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Deaf cat Magoo ( short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
There's just @nosimpleway to please everyone.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.25 AS THE CROW FLIES
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: ANDREW MALESKI
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Goldie - Kamandi YouTube: https://youtu.be/zyI7Ir-QBBY?si=MzJLyXHKiPfb4l3G Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/6UJlV1oI94CntdauIO0jjT?si=e17ccabf1cf94f30
Alex Gray
RACCONTI DELLO SCANTINATO
Morgan Sorensen
Yohann Schepacz
Keos Masons
Irina Druchinina
JB Vendamme
Kaoru Yamada
Alina Pavlova
Sang Delan
Devin Korwin
Renfei Luo
Sung Choi
J. Limon
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, in no way, shape, or form do we take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection, only for the daily effort of comprising the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. Totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Fig's first time outside
item.description:
We've been harness and leash training him since we don't have a yard. I was shocked at how well he did for his first time outside. He walked around my parents yard for half an hour checking everything out. Such a brave and curious lil guy.
Visiting grandma and grandpa's in his cool new vest.
First time on stairs.
Took the biggest nap when we got home. Splooted after a big day.
item.dc:creator: ItsMoni

item.title: I devote this dump to my wife so I can close tabs pt. 31 ft. zombie crabs
item.description:
I'm activating the sleeper agent code that triggers you to drink water and take your meds.
You have to speak the words of the spell perfectly or it will backfire.
Ghost Rider is in for some SOUL searching a-hyuk-hyuk-hyuk!
I just want a quick update: When's the last time that thoughts and prayers actually - y'know - DID anything?
I would very much prefer a smol posso cryptid over one that has flaming antlers. To each his own, I suppose.
Choose good Kuchi Kopi over bad Kuchi Kopi.
Women want fish (specifically, sushi.) Fish fear birds (specifically, eagles.) I think most fish are indifferent to my existence. I also want sushi, and respect sharks but want to keep a healthy distance between them and me. I want to find sharking boats and cut off the arms and legs of the people (let's be honest, MEN) who man those boats and toss them overboard to feed the sharks. Then their boats become part of our fleet, and we continue on until nobody is killing sharks. Who's with me?
Those ships have a lot of questions to answer.
Could be anywhere from 5 business days to 10 calendar years. Everyone in the Neurodivergence Department used to work for the cable companies.
Maybe you need more selenium in your diet?
Sure, the animals judge me. But I know they aren't talking about me behind my back.
I'd be worried about spilling tequila in my eyes. Mad skills, though!
I'm not willing to learn what squids want, and I'm determined to learn how to put together a vigilante shark-justice league. Aquaman would actually be super helpful here.
I'm 40 percent meat shenanigans!
It's 10 o'clock. Do you know where your void is? Please pet your voids for me.
I need to work on my cardio, if only for this reason.
Women want snakes. Snakes eat eggs. Women have eggs. Eggs fear snakes.
Really just trying to use every last square centimeter of real estate, aren't ya bud?
Wife always ruffles them, and I always have to smooth them back out. It's a never-ending battle.
Get your shit together, journalists. It's fucking embarrassing!
I would very much like to pet d shar pls. They are beautiful and essential creechurs.
PHENOMENAL COSMIC POWER! ᵢₜₜᵧ ᵦᵢₜₜᵧ ₗᵢᵥᵢₙg ₛₚₐcₑ
This bulbasaur has a sassy nature (+ special defense, - speed) and knows Growth, Lick, Defense curl, and Rollout. It ate an everstone, so it won't evolve, but it can still hold another item. It might accidentally eat that one, too. SOUND ON FOR THE NEXT ONE
lmao gotem
It was inevitable.
But she's the only mistress for me.
What a BOSS!
No time is shown, however. How many attempts did that ghost take in order to get that record? How many babies launched themselves at the wall, just... splattering...? I have so many questions.
Look at the love in its eyes! Accept that you are loved! Maybe give it a little kiss on its little head! Maybe!!
Obey the sign!
Drinky da nectar
You're in her DMs. I'm in her octothorpe of visible confusion. We are not the same.
I'm doing my part!
Beep
Crested geckos. They're like orange cats in that they all share one braincell among them. It's dedicated solely to jumping and jumping-adjacent thoughts, and when they land the braincell moves to its next user.
TIL these are called spoonerisms by some. I have many.
I'm not acting weird. I am weird. But also, we're a weird species on a weird planet, in a very weird period of time. So. Take it with a grain of salt.
Can anyone translate from penguin to English for me? That berd is doin' a screm.
Be the cheese witch you want to see in the world. I know I am.
7. Zen but with a crowbar.
We have, absolutely, bumbled everything to hell. Bumbled. Bungled. Bongoed. Bangles. Bumper cars. And so on, and so forth.
"Wine-dark" is obviously the color the sea turns when the ichor blood of the gods has been drained into it. Duh. Everybody knows that.
And you let the prophet that is the drive-through worker decide what hotness of sauce your soul deserves, and you LIKE IT!
Gubler the goober ^
Open-mindedness is a good thing!
Sweet baby Thor, the off-timed blink just gets me right in my heart! Shababi.
Ok, but I think I'll only listen for a few minutes a day. I don't need to look like the guy in the picture. I just want a *little* more neck muscle, thanks.
*Marine Corps Hymn intensifies and transitions into the Star Trek theme*
I think this is only true of lobsters. Isn't there at least one kind of crab that's red when it's alive?
I love it.
MM! The hip pop, tho! Mother Mary have mercy...
When he was down on his luck, Hemingway would catch pigeons at the park and bring them home so the family could eat. I'm not above eating pigeon. Or squirrel, for that matter. I think I'd draw the line at killing a crow, even if it meant my own death, though.
So true. Also, if you know that the house needs a new foundation, maybe consider putting off the painting. It's going to get wrecked when the house resettles.
Dragon hugs are especially warm because of the internal furnace. Do you think that cold-blooded reptiles gather in/near dragon dens for the heat the dragons put off? I bet they do, and eat parasites off of the dragon. Crested geckos are like the tiny frogs that tarantulas keep! Somebody put that in a story. OH! And the reason the dragons didn't initially eat the small lizards is because they aren't calorically dense enough to sustain the dragon's metabolism. Large farm animals, people, etc are the only things that can keep a dragon going. I'd imagine they'd hunt at night, too. Fly over to a village while everyone's sleeping, set it on fire with your breath, then pick over the ruins while the sun rises so you can more easily find the meats. Bring back what bones you can and crush them up a little in front of your den to attract bugs that your smol leezards can eat. No. Dragons would eat the bodies whole and regurgitate the bones later, after returning to the den. That makes sense.
I'm only vibing when I'm outside of the economy.
V8 is an electrolyte drink because of its salt content. I will not change my mind on this.
I'd watch that Eurovision act. Hell, I'd take part in it if they'd have me!
The teeth only carry spiritual power while their original owner is still youthful. Same reason why when an adult loses a tooth (say, in a bar fight over a lamp that may or may not have turned out to hold a vengeful genie within it. hypothetically.) the tooth fairy doesn't come for the tooth. They won't be alive long enough for the magic to be worth the 50 cents or whatever.
What have I become?!
Gotta try this one out.
Posso does an big steppy.
My wife sure didn't!
Gently hold d crow peets.
Amtrak's out here, fighting the good fight. Train etiquette. Super simple stuff.
Press x to doubt. x
My account got hacked years ago. There doesn't appear to be any way of getting it back. Fun stuff.
Fuck you I won't do what you tell me.
All power to forward phasers!
Special interests literal-minded, fearless, solitary. Sound off!
My gender is aligned with a planet somewhere within Alpha Proxima. I'm about... 70 + pi percent certain of it.
Yes, of course I do.
I mean... I COULD. But I'd be stopped before my quest was finished.
It's important to use whatever heuristics, processes, or shortcuts you need to, as long as you get the right answer in the end.
And remember, kids: the unjust will always claim that justice enacted on them is cruelty. But just because they say it don't make it so.
What Redwall book is this from?
There's a certain demographic for whom these yellow footprints bring up very strange emotions.
I'm playing a deck I call Grief and Solitude. What are you on?
The crows near me are learning my routes and my window. We communicate, however crudely for now, and they recognize me even when I'm not feeding them. I love me some crows.
Lungs gotta learn to stand its own two... lobes?
Not all Marvel superheroes are fascists, but they all fight to maintain the status quo instead of actually pushing for progress on systemic issues. (Also, I haven't watched almost anything after Endgame. I'm not paying for Disney+ and trying to keep up with every damn series. There's more important shit going on around me.)
I think... maybe this is distributed incorrectly. But it's been a long while since I've worked with functions, so I'm probably wrong.
Oh. My FUCKING GOD I want to go here! Cat hike!
Horses are not to be trusted. Yes, they can be very useful. Some can even be loyal. But as a group, I do not trust them.
Can't believe I found alpaca bowl in the wild. First time I saw this, my sibling sent it to me.
That's exactly the number of billiard balls I need to flush on a regular basis... How did they know this about me? Did someone install a Smart Pipe without me knowing...? Learn more about Smart Pipe here: https://youtu.be/DJklHwoYgBQ?si=PXaPIcbmjyFMNZ_m
We'll see about that. I'm betting I can lean so hard into it that we come out the other side and things wind up somewhat okay-ish.
So, so true...
For some reason, the first few lines remind me of, like... Tim Burton songs? Nightmare Before Christmas, maybe? Is that just me? AM I TAKING CRAZY PILLS?!
I have one... let's say "friend"... that I love to say this to. It drives them mad. Also, the comic is Scenes From A Multiverse. I don't know if they're still updating. I'm just going through it from the beginning because it entertains me. That's amultiverse.com for the uninitiated.
Fuck yeah, that's the one I was hoping for.
I'd totally do this, but the I lent my Life Controller to that guy in the submarine. I'm not getting that back anytime soon.
Girl, if you want snacks, just get yourself a snack! You don't have to eat mine!
I definitely don't want to do it accidentally or like an amateur.
Sounds great, frankly. I'll put up a tarp so we don't get sunburned. But we probably need two bullhorns so we don't need to keep handing it back and forth.
I'm much more critical of lyrics when I'm in a car, especially when I'm driving. Music in the background while I'm vacuuming or doing dishes? Say whatever, I won't even notice. Rhyme even slightly off while I'm pissed off at that person tailgating me? Your song will feel the brunt of my wrath. I don't know why I'm like this.
I'm betting Wife is going to find this one to be a bop.
item.dc:creator: J4nein4ne

item.title: Bloodbath.
item.description: His shills on Twitter are trying to add "context" that he "meant it would be a bloodbath for the automotive industry" or "the economy". His cult are incapable of understanding nuance. They hear bloodbath, they grab their guns. This guy needs to be in fucking prison next to all his allies.
item.dc:creator: jansenart

Made in Duvall Wa. Some nice designs from a backyard pottery shop.
Love coming across and sharing neat small business ideas and such.

item.title: Song was a Two Part. Audience member "HELPS".
item.description: After 4 oncores, she responds so wonderfullly........Awesome Lady.
